headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Parker Hannifin, Raises Price Target to $1269
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jamie Cook   maintains Parker Hannifin (NYSE:PH) with a Buy and raises the price target from $1147 to $1269.
